channel.title: Comments on: Google Code-in Grand Prize Winners Announced!

item.title: By: Jen
item.dc:creator: Jen
item.description:
Nice site, Gautam. I saw you on bbpress which brings me to your blog. Very nice blog.
Jen
item.content:encoded:
Nice site, Gautam. I saw you on bbpress which brings me to your blog. Very nice blog.

Jen

item.title: By: Nandan Jha
item.dc:creator: Nandan Jha
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-winners-announced/#comment-3387">Gautam</a>.
Please dont be sorry Gautam.
Good luck for your future and visit Ghumakkar for travel ideas :-). traveling is good.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Gautam.

Please dont be sorry Gautam.

Good luck for your future and visit Ghumakkar for travel ideas :-). traveling is good.

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-winners-announced/#comment-3386">Nandan Jha</a>.
Thanks Nandan! I'm sorry but I won't be able to help you with Ghumakkar. :)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Nandan Jha.

Thanks Nandan! I’m sorry but I won’t be able to help you with Ghumakkar. 🙂

item.title: By: Nandan Jha
item.dc:creator: Nandan Jha
item.description:
Congratulations Gautam.
I found this side while looking at bbpress , been trying to follow the progress of the plugin for a while. Am looking to use it at ghumakkar.com once it is ready. Ghumakkar is a travel website which I manage.
I know you would be very busy and would have lot of interesting projects but if you want to do something else for a change, let me know. At Ghumakkar, we are looking at building a solid travel community of real travelers and would be delighted to have some of your time for our engineering backend.
item.content:encoded:
Congratulations Gautam.

I found this side while looking at bbpress , been trying to follow the progress of the plugin for a while. Am looking to use it at ghumakkar.com once it is ready. Ghumakkar is a travel website which I manage.

I know you would be very busy and would have lot of interesting projects but if you want to do something else for a change, let me know. At Ghumakkar, we are looking at building a solid travel community of real travelers and would be delighted to have some of your time for our engineering backend.

item.title: By: Ashfame
item.dc:creator: Ashfame
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-winners-announced/#comment-3194">Gautam</a>.
May be he is talking about the threading :P
And you might want to fix the page reloads on hitting the reply button - comment-reply.js
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Gautam.

May be he is talking about the threading 😛

And you might want to fix the page reloads on hitting the reply button – comment-reply.js

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/google-code-in-winners-announced/#comment-3186">Furkan ÃœzÃ¼mcÃ¼</a>.
Lol, how is it weird? :P It is the same as your WordPress blog's.
Meet you there too. ;)
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Furkan ÃœzÃ¼mcÃ¼.

Lol, how is it weird? 😛 It is the same as your WordPress blog’s.

Meet you there too. 😉

item.title: By: Furkan ÃœzÃ¼mcÃ¼
item.dc:creator: Furkan ÃœzÃ¼mcÃ¼
item.description: That's a really weird commenting system. Congrats BTW. See you there!
item.content:encoded:
That’s a really weird commenting system.
Congrats BTW.
See you there!
